title: Phantom Wall
brief:
An isolation wall derived from the phase space folding technology applied in the archotech world, usually used as the outermost protective wall of high-end mansions, can absolutely prevent enemies from entering, while allowing the owner to freely pass through it at any time.

This special feature gives it a wider range of uses in the colony.

As the outermost wall of the colony, it prevents enemies from entering; as an internal partition of the colony, it separates different functional areas while allowing free passage.
description:
Phantom Wall Features:
*Selective access: The owner can enter and exit through it at any time, but the enemy cannot pass through it. The owner can shoot enemies through it, but enemies cannot shoot the owner through it.
* Absolutely solid: It cannot be harmed by anything, whether it is explosion, fire or attack, it will not cause any damage to it. Enemies will not try to attack it.

You can use a phantom wall to create a room without a door, completely preventing enemies from entering, but allowing the owner to enter and exit freely.

In outer space, a phantom wall can be used to fill an entire area to form a space that is free to pass through but does not lack oxygen to protect the little people inside from the outer space environment.

Home Edition: Prevents anyone from passing except colonists.
Outdoor version: only prevents enemies from passing through.

Tips: Its durability value is for viewing.
